typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT   B.row_id   ,B.master_row_id   ,A.hosp_patient_nbr   ,A.name_first   ,A.name_first_middle_clean   ,A.name_last_clean   ,A.birth_date   ,A.gender   ,A.aka_name   ,A.street_addr1   ,A.street_addr2   ,A.city   ,A.postal_code   ,A.province   ,A.phone_number   ,A.data_source   ,A.julian_month   ,A.patient_nbr   ,A.phn   ,A.phn_clean FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] A   INNER JOIN [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg3] B ON  A.row_id=B.row_id;',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcfzstg2stg3	source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   ms1.[row_id]   ,ms1.[stage_id]   ,ms1.[row_score]   ,ms1.[phn]   ,ms1.[phn_clean]   ,ms1.[name_first_middle]   ,ms1.[name_last]   ,ms1.name_first_middle_clean   ,ms1.name_last_clean   ,ms1.[birth_date]   ,ms1.[gender]   ,ms1.[dupe_count]   ,ms1.[master_row_id]   ,ms1.[master_phn]   ,ms1.[master_name_first_middle]   ,ms1.[master_name_last]   ,ms1.[master_birth_date]   ,ms1.[master_gender]   ,ms1.[match_code] FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] ms1   INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT 				master_row_id 			  FROM 				[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg3]) ps1 	ON ps1.master_row_id=ms1.master_row_id 	differently',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcmasterstg1
srcfzstg2stg3 sink(input(
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		data_source as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		province as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		patient_nbr as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_last_clean,
		name_first,
		gender,
		city,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		data_source,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		master_row_id,
		province,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		phn_clean,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		patient_nbr)) ~> destfzinput
srcmasterstg1 sink(input(
		name_last_clean as string,
		match_code as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		gender as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		row_score as integer,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		phn as string,
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		row_id as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_last_clean,
		match_code,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		gender,
		dupe_count,
		stage_id,
		master_gender,
		birth_date,
		row_score,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		master_row_id,
		master_birth_date,
		phn,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		row_id,
		name_first_middle)) ~> destmasterstg2
